div.title: Python is a dynamically typed programming language.
JavaScript (JS) is a lightweight interpreted programming language with first-class functions.
C++ is a general purpose and object-oriented programming language.
Linux is an open source kernel.
C is a general purpose programming language that first appeared in 1972.
HTML is the fundamental markup language for webpages.
Algorithms are self-contained sequences that carry out a variety of tasks.
Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) is a language used most often to style and improve upon the appearance of views.
React is an open source JavaScript library used for designing user interfaces.
An awesome list is a list of awesome things curated by the community.
A database is a structured set of data held in a computer, usually a server.
An API (Application Programming Interface) is a collection of protocols and subroutines for building software.
Amazon Web Services provides on-demand cloud computing platforms on a subscription basis.
Node.js is a tool for executing JavaScript in a variety of environments.
Bootstrap is an HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework.

section.div: A single Bash script to create blogs. Download, run, write, done!

AI-native, free, open-source alternative to Jira, Trello, ClickUp & Monday. Built for Scrum teams where humans and AI agents collaborate as equals — on the same board, the same sprints, the same goals. Self-hosted. Fully customizable via config and plugins.

Production-ready LLM API translation layer for Python — bidirectional conversion between OpenAI, Anthropic & Google formats via hub-and-spoke IR. Optional API gateway. Streaming & non-streaming. Zero core deps. Contributions welcome!
